items.title: Create and maintain 2026-04-03 work log
items.notes: Created docs/work_logs/2026-04-03.md and recorded the evidence-scheduler / tool-partition refactor rationale.

items.title: Create 2026-04-03 checklist JSON
items.notes: Initialized a new day-specific checklist to track the April 3 refactor pass.

items.title: Update iteration protocol docs for minimal required evidence and inspection partitions
items.notes: ITERATION_PROTOCOL / TOOL_SURFACE / SYSTEM_RECORD now describe minimal-required evidence, semantic-completion lane, topology-targeting lane, and joint-request groups.

items.title: Update CODEX.md with 2026-04-03 architectural direction
items.notes: Added a new 2026-04-03 focus/update section covering evidence-scheduler slimming, inspection partitions, and the scripts/describe migration assessment.

items.title: Reassess scripts/describe migration value against current runtime contracts
items.notes: Conclusion: use it as planner-facing feature digest / diagnosis aid first, not as a hard runtime judge.

items.title: Make required evidence action-conditioned instead of post-solid always-validate
items.notes: runner._build_evidence_status now keeps post-solid required evidence minimal and delays validate_requirement until semantic-terminal or blocker-driven transitions.

items.title: Limit auto query_topology capture to topology-sensitive actions
items.notes: Auto-capture no longer triggers topology just because a requirement is relation-heavy.

items.title: Add planner-facing inspection partitions and joint-request groups
items.notes: surface_policy now exposes required_now/state_readback/sketch_state/topology_targeting/semantic_completion/visual_confirmation plus compact joint groups.

items.title: Teach planner to use inspection partitions instead of broad repeated inspection
items.notes: codegen prompt now explicitly says to choose the smallest tool lane and not to treat validate_requirement as an every-round companion query.

items.title: Run focused unit regressions for runner / active_surface / codegen
items.notes: PYTHONPATH=src uv run --extra dev pytest -q tests/unit/sub_agent_runtime/test_runner_contracts.py tests/unit/sub_agent_runtime/test_active_surface.py tests/unit/sub_agent/test_codegen_aci.py -> 237 passed.

items.title: Replace thread-backed planner invoke with cancellable async provider calls
items.notes: L2_88 showed that asyncio.wait_for around to_thread(invoke) still leaves a hung worker thread. OpenAICompatibleClient now prefers ainvoke and keeps sync invoke only as a fallback.

items.title: Slim round-local capability bundle exposure and render library guidance only on demand
items.notes: Prompt bloat was dominated by capability/library cards rather than the compact round request JSON itself. Pre-solid rounds now drop solid-only bundles and omit Library Card unless the current bundle set is genuinely complex.

items.title: Run a fresh sampled full L2 after the evidence-scheduler refactor
items.notes: The 20260403_030500_l2_full_evidence_scheduler_slim run exposed a provider-level planner hang on L2_88; the next rerun should include both the async-timeout fix and the round-local prompt bundle slimming.

items.title: Inspect failed L2 cases and continue the root-cause loop
items.notes: Prompt-only create_sketch guidance was insufficient for L2_63. Triplet rerun then exposed two clearer execution-layer roots: annular explicit narrow flanges were still being mis-expanded, and a bottom-face boss extrude could absorb a later pitch-circle hole family into one invalid additive sketch. Latest L2_192 replay exposed an even deeper planner-side failure: round 2 skipped the pending bottom-face boss entirely and jumped to later top-face cut/pattern work. A new feature_agenda layer now feeds ordered requirement phases back into planner / active_surface / topology-hint prioritization before the next live rerun. Current live rerun for L2_130 also shows a second-layer validator issue: after the top-face cut succeeds, blockers still remain on feature_target_face_edit / feature_target_face_subtractive_merge, so the loop degrades into inspection-only rounds instead of converging.

items.title: Preserve no-solid local completion windows after injected create_sketch
items.notes: runner now expands a strict single selected sketch primitive into create_sketch + original local profile/completion window when the rewrite reason is bootstrap_profile_requires_explicit_create_sketch.

items.title: Parallelize independent required-evidence prefetch queries
items.notes: _maybe_prefetch_required_evidence now runs independent query_snapshot/query_sketch/query_geometry/query_topology/validate_requirement calls with asyncio.gather while preserving separate artifacts.

items.title: Update protocol docs for bootstrap continuation and parallel readonly queries
items.notes: ITERATION_PROTOCOL / TOOL_SURFACE / SYSTEM_RECORD now describe injected create_sketch window preservation and parallel required-evidence prefetch.

items.title: Reach 10/10 pass on sampled L2 with reusable fixes
Tighten annular side-flange rectangle rewrites to preserve explicit corner-anchored narrow flanges
items.notes: L2_130 first showed that runner was corrupting already-explicit flange rectangles into overlap-shell slabs. Initial boundary tightening was not sufficient: the current live rerun still rewrites explicit 2x2 bottom flanges into 9.5x7.5 overlap-shell rectangles, so more dialect guards are still required.

items.title: Delta-compact planner-facing action history instead of replaying repeated snapshot geometry
items.notes: Repeated unchanged snapshots now collapse to same_state_as_previous and history no longer repeats volume/surface_area payloads already present in current query evidence.

items.title: Measure prompt budget using the actual pretty-printed round-request payload
items.notes: L2_192 exposed that minified-length budgeting understated prompt size after indent=2 rendering; budget checks now use the real serialized form and topology-window trimming triggers accordingly.

items.title: Make planner-facing topology summary-first instead of adjacency-heavy by default
items.notes: query_topology.topology_window now keeps compact local targeting facts while full adjacency/detail remains in artifacts.

items.title: Preserve explicit annular narrow flanges beyond corner_reference-only dialects
items.notes: Center/position-anchored outer-side narrow flanges now survive annular rewrite, while axis-swapped ambiguous payloads still normalize to overlap-shell form.

items.title: Prevent additive boss extrudes from absorbing later pitch-circle hole families
items.notes: On existing solids, a primary boss circle plus a later requirement-driven multi-center hole family is now split by rewriting the secondary family to construction before additive extrude.

items.title: Add ordered feature agenda so planner does not skip earlier pending requirement phases
items.notes: Introduced common.feature_agenda, exposed it to planner prompt, reordered face target preference in active_surface, and biased topology selection hints toward the next pending phase face family.
